summary: Iteration 61 - Tree Height Categories for Carbon Premium Calculation. All 10 backend tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend CarbonScorePage fully functional with tree category visualization (Petits/Moyens/Grands cards, coefficients, biomass bar). Backward compatibility working - parcels with only nombre_arbres treated as moyens (x0.7). USSD has 9 questions including arbres_moyens.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/greenlink/carbon/my-score correctly returns new fields: arbres_petits, arbres_moyens, arbres_grands, weighted_density, arbre_categories object
arbre_categories includes: petits_lt_8m, moyens_8_12m, grands_gt_12m, total, biomasse_ponderee, coefficients (petit:0.3, moyen:0.7, grand:1.0)
Carbon score calculation uses weighted density formula: (petits*0.3 + moyens*0.7 + grands*1.0)/ha
Backward compatibility: parcels with only nombre_arbres (no categories) are treated as moyens (x0.7)
Recommendations include 'Favorisez les grands arbres (> 12m)' when grands < 30% of total
ParcelVerificationUpdate model in cooperative_parcels.py accepts arbres_petits, arbres_moyens, arbres_grands optional fields
USSD CARBON_QUESTIONS has 9 questions: Q1=hectares, Q2=arbres_grands, Q3=arbres_moyens, Q4=culture, Q5-Q9=practices
_calculate_verified_carbon_score in field_agent_dashboard.py uses COEFF_PETIT=0.3, COEFF_MOYEN=0.7, COEFF_GRAND=1.0
Frontend CarbonScorePage shows tree category breakdown with 3 cards (Petits/Moyens/Grands), coefficients, and biomass bar
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tested with existing farmer Koffi Amenan Solange who has 200 trees (all moyens by backward compat), 4 parcels, 7.7 ha total.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tree height categories feature fully implemented. API returns arbre_categories with petits_lt_8m, moyens_8_12m, grands_gt_12m, biomasse_ponderee. Weighted density = weighted_trees/total_area. Frontend shows 3 category cards with coefficients and biomass bar. USSD has 9 questions (Q2=grands, Q3=moyens). Backward compat: old parcels with only nombre_arbres treated as moyens (x0.7).

carbon_score.GET /api/greenlink/carbon/my-score: PASS - Returns arbre_categories with petits_lt_8m, moyens_8_12m, grands_gt_12m, biomasse_ponderee, coefficients

parcel_verification.PUT /api/cooperative/parcels/{id}/verify: PASS - Accepts arbres_petits, arbres_moyens, arbres_grands fields

ussd_carbon_calculator.POST /api/ussd/carbon-calculator (full f: PASS - Returns result with arbres_grands, arbres_moyens, weighted calculation

carbon_score_page.breakdown_section: PASS - Shows Base, Arbres (with pondéré), Ombrage, Pratiques, Surface
carbon_score_page.tree_categories_section: PASS - Shows 'Répartition des arbres par taille (biomasse)'
carbon_score_page.biomass_bar: PASS - Shows proportional bar with amber/green/emerald colors
carbon_score_page.recommendations: PASS - Includes 'Favorisez les grands arbres (> 12m)' with +1 pts

test_data_verified.backward_compat_verified: Yes - 200 trees with no categories treated as moyens (200 * 0.7 = 140)
